---
title: "R for Bioinformatics"
categories: [Research, Data Analysis, Public Health]
image: "logo.gif"
---
```{=html}
<a href="" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill me-2">Cohort 01</a>
<a href="" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill">Cohort 02</a>
<a href="" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill">Cohort 03</a>
```
